attempts.latestEventSummary: feature completed: Kustomize Overlays, Multi-AZ, and Autoscaling in 0 attempts

reinforcementResults.name: Contract Lockstep Gate
reinforcementResults.summary: Validated against acceptance signals: `kustomize build` succeeds for `dev`/`staging`/`production`; overlays keep the `base/components/overlays` structure; rendered manifests include HPA for `api`/`mcp`/`web`, KEDA `ScaledObject` for `compliance-worker`, and topology spread constraints for the required deployments. Overlay annotations and values consistently encode `hpa-plus-keda-worker` + `multi-az` runtime strategy across environments (with lighter dev replica/autoscaling values). Active API-contract policy is satisfied for this feature scope because the feature diff is infrastructure-focused and does not introduce backend/OpenAPI/generated-client interface changes.

reinforcementResults.name: Runtime Security Gate
reinforcementResults.summary: No blocking issues found for this feature. `kustomize build` succeeds for `ops/kubernetes/overlays/dev`, `staging`, and `production`; overlays consistently use `base/components/overlays` with aligned runtime-strategy annotations, multi-AZ topology component patches, and HPA+KEDA autoscaling (including worker HPA removal and ScaledObject presence). Rendered gateway/network/secret posture satisfies the active policy: HTTPS listener with TLS termination, CORS + rate-limit + body-size policies, default-deny plus allowlist NetworkPolicies, and ExternalSecret-backed credential wiring with no plaintext `Secret` manifests in `ops/kubernetes`. Residual gap: Cargo-based security baseline tests were not runnable in this read-only sandbox.

reinforcementResults.name: No-Legacy/Fallback Gate
reinforcementResults.summary: `kustomize build` succeeds for `ops/kubernetes/overlays/dev`, `staging`, and `production`. The `base/components/overlays` structure is intact, overlays consistently encode the selected runtime strategy (`hpa-plus-keda-worker` + `multi-az`), rendered manifests include HPA for API/MCP/Web plus KEDA `ScaledObject` for compliance-worker, and topology spread constraints are present for required deployments (including PgBouncer). Within this feature scope, no policy blocker was found and no excluded fallback pattern was reintroduced.
